_meta.note: LoraMer Lora accuracy eval — golden set v1. Every `expected` value was HAND-VERIFIED against metrics_daily (account-canonical rows: entity_level='account', breakdown_type='', breakdown_value='') on 2026-07-14 via the Supabase MCP; see LORAMER_LORA_AUDIT for the ground-truth queries. Window LAST_MONTH == June 2026 (today 2026-07-14). Assertions score Lora's REAL /api/chat answer, not a self-grade.
_meta.toleranceNote: Numeric match uses +/-2% tolerance so natural rounding ('~$82K') passes but a wrong-SOURCE number (usually >10% off) fails — the surface-sync signal.

questions.message: What was the total ad spend for June 2026?
What was the total Google Ads spend in June 2026?
How much did we spend on ads in June 2026?
What was our store revenue in June 2026?
What was Meta ad spend and store revenue in June 2026?
What was total ad spend in June 2026?
What was total ad spend in June 2026?
What was ad spend and store revenue in June 2026?
What was our Google Ads spend in January 2025?

assert.note: google data starts 2026-03-23; Jan 2025 is before data start → must say no data, never $0

questions.message: What was our total revenue in 2023?

assert.note: store starts 2025-12-16; 2023 is before any data → must say no data, never $0

questions.message: What was our Google Ads spend in June 2026?

assert.note: Shelley has NO Google Ads connection → must say not connected / no Google Ads, never $0

questions.message: How much did we spend on Meta ads in June 2026?

assert.note: Bath Fitter has NO Meta connection → must say not connected / no Meta, never $0

questions.message: What was our ROAS in June 2026?

assert.note: Champion has google spend but NO store/GA revenue source → ROAS uncomputable; must say no revenue data to compute ROAS, never fabricate a ratio or 0

questions.message: What was our Google Ads spend in 2019?

assert.note: google data starts 2020-01-27; 2019 is before data start → must say no data, never $0

questions.message: What was our Shopify store revenue in June 2026?

assert.note: Veterinary has NO store connection (GA only) → must say no store connected, never invent a store number

questions.message: What was our Meta ad spend in January 2024?

assert.note: Meta data starts 2025-03-17; Jan 2024 is before Meta data → must say no Meta data then, never $0

questions.message: What is our ROAS for June 2026? Show it from each data source we have.

assert.note: store $128,896.56 vs GA $13,609.20 vs Meta purchase-ROAS all differ on ad spend $1,382.36 — must surface DISTINCT values labeled by source, not one collapsed number

questions.message: What was our return on ad spend in June 2026, broken down by each source you have?

assert.note: woo store $2,885.45 vs GA $2,438.54 vs Meta on meta spend $997.72 — distinct sources

questions.message: My Shopify says a different ROAS than my ad platform. Why do the ROAS numbers differ across sources for June 2026?

assert.note: must EXPLAIN the difference (attribution/window/store-net vs platform-reported), naming ≥2 sources

questions.message: How many conversions did Meta drive in June 2026?

assert.note: account-deduped Meta conversions = 18; a campaign-summed / action-type-double-counted answer would overstate well above 18

questions.message: How many Meta conversions did we get in June 2026?
Our cost of goods is 40% of revenue. Based on June 2026 store revenue, what is our gross margin in dollars?
If COGS is 60% of revenue, what was our gross profit in dollars for June 2026 store revenue?
[FORMAT PROBE] XLSX ingestion — a customer uploads an .xlsx COGS sheet.

assert.reason: upload/route.ts supports only txt/csv/pdf/docx; XLSX → 400 'Unsupported file type'. The spreadsheet the customer actually has cannot be ingested → automatic format fail (no live call).

questions.message: Compare Google Ads spend in Q4 2024 versus Q4 2023.
How did Google Ads spend in Q1 2025 compare to Q1 2024?
What was our Google Ads spend for the full year 2024? And for Q4 2024 specifically?

assert.label: Q4-2024 (subset of year) — must at least get Q4 right + label windows
